title: Winter Chill escape roll unfreezes creature and destroys equip

card.rawText: The equipped creature is frozen and cannot inflict Atk Damage or be sacrificed. During your opponent's turn they may roll 1 die. If the result is 5-6, unfreeze their creature and destroy this card.

plan.title: Winter Chill escape roll unfreezes creature and destroys equip
plan.summary: During the frozen creature controller's turn, roll 1D6 for Winter Chill; on 5-6 remove Frozen from that creature and destroy Winter Chill.

notes: Attach Winter Chill to player_2 primary and start with that creature Frozen by Winter Chill.
It is player_2's turn; player_2 may make this roll at any point during their turn.

steps: Player 2 activates Winter Chill's escape roll during their turn.
Inspect player_2 primary status and player_1 cemetery.
manualVerification: Confirm the action is available to the frozen creature's controller during their turn, not to the Winter Chill controller on the opponent's turn.
riskNotes: This covers the successful 5-6 branch. A failed 1-4 roll should leave Frozen and Winter Chill in place.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate opponent-turn escape roll success branch.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
